sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n60794" key="kumoplh/c" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κῡμο-πλήξ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῆγος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n60794.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">κυματοπλήξ</ref></xr>, Hdn.Gr. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.46</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
